articles.author: Associated Press
articles.title: 2026 NFL schedule: Execs discuss weekday openers, 49ers' travel, prime-time shutouts, rest disparity - NFL.com
articles.description: With Labor Day falling later this year and the NFL wanting to play a Week 1 game in Australia, the opener was moved to a Wednesday for the second time in league history. That might not be a one-off.
articles.content:
The days of every NFL team being guaranteed a prime-time game are in the past with five teams failing to get a game in one of those high-profile windows this season.
Tennessee, Miami, Arizona, the L… [+1842 chars]
